title: Structured Output Generation
description: Developer requests AI responses conforming to a defined JSON/object schema, using ObjectSchema and structured response types.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Creates agents, defines schemas, prompts agents, and consumes structured responses

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: Concrete class implementing HasStructuredOutput (e.g. StructuredAnonymousAgent) or a custom agent with schema() method

actors.name: AI Gateway / Provider
actors.description: Executes text generation with schema enforcement; uses GeneratesText trait and ComposesSchemaInstructions

use_cases.name: Define Object Schema
use_cases.description: Developer instantiates ObjectSchema(array $schema, string $name, bool $strict) to declare a JSON schema for AI output. ObjectSchema extends Schema, wraps Illuminate ObjectType, and enforces additionalProperties=false recursively via disableAdditionalProperties().

use_cases.name: Implement HasStructuredOutput on Agent
use_cases.description: Developer creates an agent class implementing HasStructuredOutput contract, or uses StructuredAnonymousAgent. The contract requires schema(JsonSchema $schema): array. StructuredAnonymousAgent wraps a Closure as SerializableClosure and delegates schema() to it.
use_cases.notes: StructuredAnonymousAgent extends AnonymousAgent (which implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools) and adds HasStructuredOutput.

use_cases.name: Prompt Agent for Structured Response
use_cases.description: Developer calls provider's prompt(AgentPrompt) which runs through middleware pipeline. Inside GeneratesText::prompt(), it checks if agent instanceof HasStructuredOutput and calls agent->schema(new JsonSchemaTypeFactory) to retrieve schema array.
flow: check: agent instanceof HasStructuredOutput ? agent->schema(new JsonSchemaTypeFactory) : null
if schema not empty → return StructuredAgentResponse else AgentResponse

use_cases.name: Enforce Schema in AI Request
use_cases.description: Some gateways (e.g. Anthropic, Ollama, Mistral) use ComposesSchemaInstructions trait to embed the schema as a system instruction. This trait wraps the schema in an ObjectSchema, serialises it as JSON, and prepends a strict instruction to the agent's instructions string.
use_cases.notes: Prism-based gateways (CreatesPrismTextRequests) use ObjectSchema::schemaType() and pass it natively as a structured format parameter instead.

use_cases.name: Receive Structured Agent Response
use_cases.description: Developer receives a StructuredAgentResponse containing $structured array, $text, Usage, and Meta. Response implements Arrayable, ArrayAccess, Jsonable, JsonSerializable, allowing direct array/JSON access to the structured data.

use_cases.name: Access Structured Text Response (non-agent)
use_cases.description: When using the AI service directly (not via agent), a StructuredTextResponse is returned. It extends TextResponse and also uses ProvidesStructuredResponse trait, providing ArrayAccess to the structured data.

key_relationships: StructuredStep extends Step (contains structured array per step)
use_case_relationships: UC2 includes UC1 (agent schema() typically returns ObjectSchema or array built with JsonSchemaTypeFactory)
UC3 includes UC2 (prompting requires agent implementing HasStructuredOutput)
UC3 includes UC4 (gateway enforces schema during request building)
UC3 includes UC5 (prompting produces StructuredAgentResponse when schema present)
UC6 extends UC5 (non-agent path, same structured data but TextResponse base)
important_notes: Schema strictness: ObjectSchema always sets additionalProperties=false recursively on all nested object nodes and array items.

Two enforcement strategies: (1) Native structured output via Prism gateway using schemaType()='object'; (2) Instruction injection via ComposesSchemaInstructions for gateways that don't support native structured output.
StructuredAnonymousAgent uses SerializableClosure to allow the schema Closure to be serialized (e.g. for queued jobs).
Developer interacts with structured data via ArrayAccess ($response['key']), toArray(), toJson(), or __toString() returning JSON.
Schema::withName() allows renaming a schema for reuse across multiple agent calls.
StructuredStep captures structured output per-step in multi-step agent conversations.
